title: Add Pendo Tracking Class and Margin to Add Object Button
story: As a product administrator, I want the Add Object button to have a tracking class for usage analytics and proper spacing from the search bar, so that we can measure feature adoption and improve visual layout.
description:
Two updates to the Add Object button:

1. **CSS class**: Added a tracking class for Pendo.io usage analytics
2. **Right margin**: Added 5px right margin to create spacing between the button and the search bar

The button appears in three locations across the application, and all three instances were updated.
acceptance_criteria: Add Object button has a Pendo tracking CSS class applied
Button has 5px right margin separating it from the search bar
All three instances of the button across the application are updated
ux_changes: Added tracking class and 5px right margin to the Add Object button in all three locations.
implementation_notes: The Add Object button exists in three places in the app; all were updated with the new class and margin.
comment_summary: Developer updated all three button instances and deployed to development for review.
